query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND a.orderNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_orderNumber,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.totalAmount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.storeName IS NOT NULL AND a.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND a.imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_imageUrl,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND r.orderNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_orderNumber,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.totalAmount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.storeName IS NOT NULL AND r.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.pointsAwarded IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_pointsAwarded,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.pointsCalculated IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_pointsCalculated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.ocrRawText IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_ocrRawText,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.purchaseDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_purchaseDate
FROM ai_auto_review_logs a
LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id
WHERE a.isDryRun = 0
LIMIT 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN a.storeName IS NOT NULL AND a.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND a.imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_imageUrl,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND r.orderNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_orderNumber,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.totalAmount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.storeName IS NOT NULL AND r.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.pointsAwarded IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_pointsAwarded,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.pointsCalculated IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_pointsCalculated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.ocrRawText IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_ocrRawText,
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.purchaseDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as receipt_has_purchaseDate
FROM ai_auto_review_logs a
LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id
